name: Dauch Corp
summary: Part I Effective January 26, 2026, American Axle & Manufacturing Holdings, Inc. changed its name to Dauch Corporation. As used in this report, except as otherwise indicated in information incorporated by reference, references to our Company, "we," "our," "us" or Dauch mean Dauch Corporation and its subsidiaries and predecessors, collectively.
